subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Creator of the heavens and the Lord of all things, summoning all unto this Most Exalted Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله فاطر السماء و مالک الاشیاء و یدعو الکل به الی هذا المقام الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @presence of; reunion with God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
